review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --output-format json < staged diff prompt > /tmp/cp00-107-claude-review-output-valid.json

parsed_review.rationale: CP00-107 binds the RP01 terminal Risk B review closeout readiness catalog over RP01.P09.M07.S09-RP01.P09.M10.S01 with unit_count 16. The phase distribution is internally consistent and produces exactly 16 unique covered units (M07:S09-S11, M08:S01-S08, M09:S01-S04, M10:S01) with no duplicates, matching the contract, manifest, validator, and tests. Kind/role counts reconcile across catalog, manifest, validator, and tests: 12 review questions, 1 risk register, 1 final severity taxonomy, 1 go/no-go verdict format, 1 finding routing map; 8 Hermes evidence packet references (M08), 4 Claude review packet references (M09), 1 closeout handoff reference (M10), 3 terminal outcome references (M07), and 2 permission + 2 audit boundary questions. Severity taxonomy exposes P0-P3; verdict format preserves PASS/PASS_WITH_FINDINGS/BLOCK; finding routing map includes block_pack_for_p0_p1, fix_or_defer_p2, document_p3, preserve_no_write_boundary, and handoff_to_rp02. Closeout handoff targets CP00-108 / RP02.P00.M00.S01 and is marked rp01_terminal with next_program_id RP02. No-write and reference-only guarantees hold consistently across the contract JSON, source CONTRACT constant, per-item freeze, manifest no_write_attestation, Hermes packet, and the coverage validator loop: accepts_real_client_data/uses_real_client_data false, synthetic_only true, and evaluates_runtime_permission, writes_audit_event, writes_product_state, creates_database_rows, executes_ai_retrieval, executes_export_download, executes_external_share, mutates_locks, retries_operations, performs_rollback, performs_compensation, executes_claude_review, grants_human_approval, mutates_issue_routing, ldip_implemented all false; forbidden_claims enumerate all 16 prohibited assertions. The Hermes packet stays reference-only (status ready_for_command_evidence, command anchors only) and the Claude packet is read_only with model claude-opus-4-8, effort max, exactly_one_valid_pack_review_required true, executing no review by catalog. Production gating is adequate: validate-rp01-core-domain-contract.mjs asserts current_pack.production_ready_flag core_domain_review_closeout_readiness_verified, re-homes the prior pack under review_outcome_routing_pack, mirrors every boundary/array field between JSON and the source contract, and requires validateCoreDomainCp107Coverage().valid===true with all reconciled counts; the test suite independently asserts bindings, row composition, no-write invariants, handoff targets, and coverage validity. Template reuse by unit index (e.g., the M10 closeout handoff row carrying the architecture template's item_id/title) is a cosmetic labeling artifact consistent with the established pack pattern, carries the real semantics in phase_role/kind, and violates no boundary or gate; it does not warrant a finding. No deviations from synthetic-only, reference-only, no-runtime-mutation, no-Claude-execution, no-human-approval, no-issue-routing-mutation, or no-LDIP requirements were found.
notes: No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings were reported by the valid CP00-107 pack-level Claude review.
No post-review code change was required.
No second valid Claude review was run.
